response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience on Windows or direct capital markets/fixed income domain exposure, despite claiming 5–10 years of software development; their work is centered on TypeScript, Node.js, DLang, and web/mobile systems with no evidence of SQL Server/Oracle or financial system development.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience
Active open-source contributor with documented technical leadership
Demonstrated CI/CD, testing, and dev-ops infrastructure skills
concerns: No verifiable C++ experience on Windows platform as required
Zero evidence of fixed income, capital markets, or investment banking domain knowledge
SQL experience listed but not tied to SQL Server or Oracle in financial contexts
